description: PROP-010 (modal within 100ms) and REQ-018 are still unverified at the DOM level. The Sprint-2 FIND-206 fix replaced the vacuous stub with three wall-clock timing tests, BUT all three measure (storeSetAt - ipcResolvedAt) on the LOGIC layer (appShellStore value), not on the DOM (modal element presence). REQ-018 NFR-01 explicitly requires 'モーダル表示遅延' (modal RENDERING delay) ≤ 100ms — i.e., when the VaultSetupModal element appears in the DOM. The new tests prove the store transitions in <100ms but say nothing about whether the modal element actually appears in the DOM within 100ms after that. Svelte's reactivity could in theory introduce a delay (microtask scheduling, transitions, etc.). The verification-architecture.md PROP-010 detail (lines 426-441) explicitly mandates a DOM mount with screen.getByTestId('vault-setup-modal') — that DOM assertion is still missing. CRIT-008 passThreshold accepted the logic-layer surrogate but the underlying NFR is unverified.
